author: Star Wars YouTube
Star Wars YouTube
text:
Drawing Anakin Skywalker's Journey (ft. Star Wars Comics Artist Will Sliney) | Star Wars Illustrated
Join comic artist Will Sliney as he explores the complete journey of Anakin Skywalker’s transformation into Darth Vader, tracing the fall of a Jedi Knight into the dark side of the Force.

00:00 - Introduction
0:56 - Chapter 1 - The Phantom Meance
4:32 - Chapter 2 - Attack of the Clones 
7:15 - Chapter 3 - Padmé
9:30 - Chapter 4 - The Clone Wars
11:50 - Chapter 5 - Revenge of the Sith 
15:23 - Chapter 6 - Darth Vader
20:06 - Chapter 7 - Mentors 
21:23 - Chapter 8 - The Final Image!
